entries.name: Lost Traveller
entries.description: A frightened traveller asks for help finding the road or settlement.

entries.name: Suspicious Patrol
entries.description: Armed locals question the party's purpose.

entries.name: Predator Sign
entries.description: Tracks, disturbed ground or distant cries suggest something dangerous nearby.

entries.name: Ruined Campsite
entries.description: An abandoned camp contains clues, supplies and one worrying detail.

entries.name: Faction Messenger
entries.description: A courier is carrying a message that could complicate local politics.

entries.name: Environmental Hazard
entries.description: Weather, terrain or old magic creates a travel complication.

entries.name: Named NPC Encounter
entries.description: Introduce a recurring NPC tied to the region's current problem.
